summary: Removed the unreachable refreshAccessToken() function from the HTTP client.
reason: Greptile review (PR #576): ServiceTitan composed auth only issues client_credentials tokens — no refresh tokens are ever minted. The generator-emitted function was never called from authHeader() (which uses mintClientCredentials exclusively) and existed only to mislead future maintainers into believing a refresh-token flow was wired.
validated_outcome: go build, go vet, go test ./internal/pricebook/ all clean
